description: Style Note Three times the fun with this pack of three tees from campbell! Easy to wear, easy care, practical T-shirts for the no-nonsense guy who doesn't have time to worry about his clothes - just grab and go for a fuss-free look. Product Details Pack of 3 round neck t-shirts with short sleeves in black, grey and white, has printed label for irritation-free comfort, white tee has a print on the upper front Material and Care 100% premium cotton Machine wash cold Do not bleachTumble dry low or dry in shade inside outWarm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
